main_hypothesis.justification: Anchor 'biofouling + materia orgánica + mar gruesa + DAF degradada'.

recommended_action.justification: CIP biocida alcalino con dodecilguanidina 0.1% (no oxidante compatible PA) — simple.

requested_data.justification: Pide HPC alimentación — match parcial accepted.

decision_change_condition.justification: Trivial threshold ATP bajo + Fe/Al elevados → inorgánico.
